word: H4743 - מָקַק - mâqaq - maw-kak' - Consume away

sections.paragraph:
Original: מקק

Transliteration: mâqaq

Phonetic: maw-kak'

BDB Definition:

  1. to decay, pine away, rot, fester
    1. (Niphal)
      1. to fester (of wounds)
      2. to rot, rot away
      3. to moulder away
      4. to pine away
    2. (Hiphil) to cause to rot

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1237

Part(s) of speech: Verb
